mapper.select:
SELECT u.uid, u.nickname, u.phone, u.avatar, u.team_level AS teamLevelId, stl.name AS teamLevelName, stl.grade AS grade, stat.self_paid_amount AS selfPaidAmount, stat.self_complete_amount AS selfCompleteAmount, stat.team_paid_amount AS teamPaidAmount, stat.team_complete_amount AS teamCompleteAmount, stat.update_time AS updateTime FROM eb_user u LEFT JOIN eb_user_team_level_stat stat ON stat.uid = u.uid LEFT JOIN eb_system_team_level stl ON stl.id = u.team_level WHERE 1 = 1
AND ( u.uid = #{keywords} OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywords}, '%') OR u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywords}, '%') )
AND u.team_level = #{teamLevelId}
ORDER BY stat.update_time DESC, u.uid DESC
